productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Blue Top
description: Composition Blue denim tunic top made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, half buttoned placket, pin-tucks on the yoke and a curved and vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or dry flat in shade Warm iron The neckline gives this heavy duty denim tunic top a dainty look. This top from Sullers for Her will look great when teamed with a simple black leggings or jeans and ballerina flats for a day out. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
